have h₉ : (-1 : ℂ) • (μ.rnDeriv μ.var) = -μ.rnDeriv μ.var := by
          simp [Complex.ext_iff, smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]
          <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ext_iff, smul_eq_mul]
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ext_iff, smul_eq_mul]
          <;> norm_num
          <;> aesop
        rw [h₇]
        <;> rw [h₉]
      -- Combine the results to get the final answer
      have h₁₀ : (-μ).rnDeriv μ.var = -μ.ang := by
        calc
          (-μ).rnDeriv μ.var = -μ.rnDeriv μ.var := by rw [h₆]
          _ = -μ.ang := by
            have h₁₁ : μ.ang = μ.rnDeriv μ.var := rfl
            rw [h₁₁]
            <;>
            simp [Complex.ext_iff, smul_eq_mul, mul_comm]
            <;>
            simp_all [Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ext_iff, Complex.ext_iff, smul_eq_mul]

    rw [h₄]
